Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotTextBox

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotElement
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTextBox
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPotElement
public class PotTextBox extends PotElement
Represents a text box shape within a PowerPoint slide, providing a fluent API for text and style manipulation.

This class encapsulates an Apache POI XSLFTextBox and offers methods to set text content, configure font properties (family, size, color, weight, style), adjust paragraph formatting (alignment, spacing, indentation, bullets), apply fills and borders, and control layout properties such as padding, word wrap, and auto-fitting. All style methods return the instance itself, enabling method chaining. The underlying POI object can be accessed via getRawTextBox() for advanced operations.

Basic Usage Example


 PotTextBox textBox = slide.addTextBox("Hello World")
     .at(100, 100)
     .size(400, 50)
     .fontFamily("Arial")
     .fontSize(24)
     .fontColor(PotColor.RED)
     .bold()
     .align(PotAlignment.CENTER);

Paragraph Formatting Example


 textBox.lineSpacing(1.5)
     .paragraphSpacing(12)
     .bullet(true)
     .indent(20);
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

    PotTextBox
    action(PotAction action)
    Attaches an action (e.g., mouseclick or mouseover) to the element.

    Adds a new empty paragraph to the end of the text box.

    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the text box.

    Methods inherited from class cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotElement

  • Method Details

    • setText

      public PotTextBox setText(String text)
      Sets the plain text content of the entire text box, replacing any existing text.

      If the provided text is null, the text box content is set to an empty string. This operation affects all paragraphs and text runs within the box.

      Parameters:
      text - the new text content; may be null which is treated as an empty string
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns the plain text content of the entire text box.

      The returned string is the concatenation of all text runs across all paragraphs, as provided by the underlying POI object.

      Returns:
      the current text content of the text box; never null but may be empty

    • appendText

      public PotTextBox appendText(String text)
      Appends the specified text to the end of the text box content, adding a new line after the appended text.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to appendText(text, true). If the text is null, no operation is performed.

      Parameters:
      text - the text to append; may be null in which case no change occurs
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • appendText(String, boolean)

    • appendText

      public PotTextBox appendText(String text, boolean newLine)
      Appends the specified text to the end of the text box content, optionally starting a new line.

      The text is appended to the last paragraph, or a new paragraph is created if necessary. If newLine is true, a line break is added after the appended text, effectively starting a new line within the same paragraph. If the text is null, no operation is performed.

      Parameters:
      text - the text to append; may be null in which case no change occurs
      newLine - if true, a line break is inserted after the appended text
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • clearText

      public PotTextBox clearText()
      Clears all text content from the text box.

      This method removes all text runs and paragraphs, leaving the text box empty. Formatting properties (font, alignment, etc.) are not reset.

      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • fontFamily

      public PotTextBox fontFamily(String family)
      Sets the font family for all text runs within the text box.

      The family name must be a non-blank string (e.g., "Arial", "Calibri"). The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      family - the font family name; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if family is null or blank

    • fontSize

      public PotTextBox fontSize(double size)
      Sets the font size in points for all text runs within the text box.

      The size must be a positive number. The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      size - the font size in points; must be greater than zero
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive

    • fontColor

      public PotTextBox fontColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the font color for all text runs within the text box using a PotColor.

      If the provided color is null, no change is made. The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      color - the font color; may be null to leave the color unchanged
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • fontColor

      public PotTextBox fontColor(Color color)
      Sets the font color for all text runs within the text box using a standard AWT Color.

      If the provided color is null, no change is made. The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      color - the AWT color; may be null to leave the color unchanged
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • bold

      public PotTextBox bold()
      Enables bold font weight for all text runs within the text box.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to bold(true).

      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • bold(boolean)

    • bold

      public PotTextBox bold(boolean bold)
      Sets the bold font weight for all text runs within the text box.

      The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      bold - true to enable bold, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • italic

      public PotTextBox italic()
      Enables italic font style for all text runs within the text box.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to italic(true).

      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • italic(boolean)

    • italic

      public PotTextBox italic(boolean italic)
      Sets the italic font style for all text runs within the text box.

      The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      italic - true to enable italic, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • underline

      public PotTextBox underline()
      Enables underline for all text runs within the text box.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to underline(true).

      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • underline(boolean)

    • underline

      public PotTextBox underline(boolean underline)
      Sets the underline style for all text runs within the text box.

      The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      underline - true to enable underline, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • strikethrough

      public PotTextBox strikethrough()
      Enables strikethrough for all text runs within the text box.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to strikethrough(true).

      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      See Also:
      • strikethrough(boolean)

    • strikethrough

      public PotTextBox strikethrough(boolean strikethrough)
      Sets the strikethrough style for all text runs within the text box.

      The change is applied uniformly to every text run in every paragraph.

      Parameters:
      strikethrough - true to enable strikethrough, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • font

      public PotTextBox font(PotFont font)
      Applies a comprehensive font configuration from a PotFont object.

      This method sets all font properties (family, size, color, bold, italic, underline, strikethrough) that are defined (non-null or non-default) in the provided PotFont. Properties that are null or zero in the font object are skipped, leaving the existing settings unchanged.

      Parameters:
      font - the font configuration object; may be null, in which case no changes are made
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • align

      public PotTextBox align(PotAlignment alignment)
      Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the text box.

      If the provided alignment is null, no change is made. The alignment is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      alignment - the desired horizontal alignment; may be null
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • verticalAlign

      public PotTextBox verticalAlign(PotVerticalAlignment alignment)
      Sets the vertical alignment of text within the text box shape.

      This controls how text is positioned vertically (top, middle, bottom) inside the shape's bounds. If the provided alignment is null, no change is made.

      Parameters:
      alignment - the desired vertical alignment; may be null
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • lineSpacing

      public PotTextBox lineSpacing(double spacing)
      Sets the line spacing (leading) for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The spacing is specified as a multiplier of the normal line height. For example, a value of 1.5 results in one-and-a-half line spacing. The value must be positive. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      spacing - the line spacing multiplier; must be greater than zero
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if spacing is not positive

    • spaceBefore

      public PotTextBox spaceBefore(double spacing)
      Sets the space before each paragraph for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The spacing is specified in points. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      spacing - the space before each paragraph in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • spaceAfter

      public PotTextBox spaceAfter(double spacing)
      Sets the space after each paragraph for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The spacing is specified in points. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      spacing - the space after each paragraph in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • indent

      public PotTextBox indent(double indent)
      Sets the left indent for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The indent is specified in points. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      indent - the left indent in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • leftMargin

      public PotTextBox leftMargin(double margin)
      Sets the left margin for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The margin is specified in points. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      margin - the left margin in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • rightMargin

      public PotTextBox rightMargin(double margin)
      Sets the right margin for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The margin is specified in points. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      margin - the right margin in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • bullet

      public PotTextBox bullet(boolean bullet)
      Enables or disables bullet points for all paragraphs within the text box.

      The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      bullet - true to enable bullets, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • bulletCharacter

      public PotTextBox bulletCharacter(String character)
      Sets a custom bullet character for all paragraphs within the text box and enables bullets.

      This method enables bullets and sets the specified character as the bullet symbol for every paragraph. If the character is null or empty, the default bullet character is used.

      Parameters:
      character - the custom bullet character (e.g., "", ""); may be null
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • bulletColor

      public PotTextBox bulletColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the bullet color for all paragraphs within the text box.

      If the provided color is null, no change is made. The change is applied to every paragraph in the text box.

      Parameters:
      color - the bullet color; may be null
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotTextBox fill(PotColor color)
      Sets a solid fill color for the text box shape.

      If the provided color is null, the fill is removed (set to transparent).

      Parameters:
      color - the solid fill color; null removes the fill
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotTextBox fill(PotFill fill)
      Applies a complex fill (gradient, image, pattern, or solid) to the text box shape.

      The fill is configured according to the properties of the provided PotFill object. If the object is null, the fill is removed (equivalent to noFill()). Supported fill types are gradient, image, pattern, and solid color.

      Usage Example

      
 // Solid fill
 textBox.fill(PotFill.solid(PotColor.BLUE));

 // Gradient fill
 textBox.fill(PotFill.gradient(PotGradient.linear(45, PotColor.RED, PotColor.YELLOW)));

 // Image fill (from byte array)
 byte[] imageBytes = ...;
 textBox.fill(PotFill.image(imageBytes));
      Parameters:
      fill - the fill configuration object; may be null to remove the fill
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • noFill

      public PotTextBox noFill()
      Removes any fill from the text box shape, making it transparent.

      This is equivalent to fill((PotColor) null).

      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • border

      public PotTextBox border(PotBorder border)
      Applies a border configuration to the text box shape.

      This method sets the border color, width, dash style, and cap style according to the properties of the provided PotBorder object. If the object is null, the border is removed (equivalent to noBorder()).

      Parameters:
      border - the border configuration object; may be null to remove the border
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • borderColor

      public PotTextBox borderColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the border color of the text box shape.

      If the provided color is null, no change is made.

      Parameters:
      color - the border color; may be null
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • borderWidth

      public PotTextBox borderWidth(double width)
      Sets the border width (line width) of the text box shape.

      The width is specified in points. A width of zero effectively removes the border.

      Parameters:
      width - the border width in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • noBorder

      public PotTextBox noBorder()
      Removes the border from the text box shape by setting its width to zero.
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • padding

      public PotTextBox padding(double padding)
      Sets uniform padding (inset) on all four sides of the text box.

      The padding is the space between the text content and the inner edges of the shape. The value is specified in points.

      Parameters:
      padding - the padding value applied to all sides, in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • padding

      public PotTextBox padding(double top, double right, double bottom, double left)
      Sets individual padding (inset) values for each side of the text box.

      The padding is the space between the text content and the inner edges of the shape. Values are specified in points.

      Parameters:
      top - the top padding in points
      right - the right padding in points
      bottom - the bottom padding in points
      left - the left padding in points
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • getTopInset

      public double getTopInset()
      Returns the top padding (inset) of the text box.
      Returns:
      the top padding in points

    • getRightInset

      public double getRightInset()
      Returns the right padding (inset) of the text box.
      Returns:
      the right padding in points

    • getBottomInset

      public double getBottomInset()
      Returns the bottom padding (inset) of the text box.
      Returns:
      the bottom padding in points

    • getLeftInset

      public double getLeftInset()
      Returns the left padding (inset) of the text box.
      Returns:
      the left padding in points

    • wordWrap

      public PotTextBox wordWrap(boolean wrap)
      Enables or disables word wrapping within the text box.

      When enabled, text that exceeds the width of the shape wraps to the next line. When disabled, text may be clipped or overflow the shape.

      Parameters:
      wrap - true to enable word wrapping, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • textDirection

      public PotTextBox textDirection(PotDirection direction)
      Sets the text direction (writing direction) for the text box.

      This controls the flow of text, such as left-to-right, right-to-left, or vertical. If the provided direction is null, no change is made.

      Parameters:
      direction - the desired text direction; may be null
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • autoFit

      public PotTextBox autoFit(boolean autoFit)
      Enables or disables automatic text fitting within the text box.

      When enabled, the font size may be automatically adjusted to fit the text within the shape's bounds. When disabled, the font size remains as set.

      Parameters:
      autoFit - true to enable automatic fitting, false to disable
      Returns:
      this PotTextBox instance for method chaining

    • getParagraphCount

      public int getParagraphCount()
      Returns the number of paragraphs in the text box.

      A paragraph is a block of text separated by line breaks or new paragraph markers.

      Returns:
      the count of paragraphs

    • getParagraphs

      public List<org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTextParagraph> getParagraphs()
      Returns the underlying POI paragraph objects for advanced manipulation.

      This method provides direct access to the Apache POI XSLFTextParagraph list. Use with caution, as modifications may affect the integrity of the wrapper.

      Returns:
      a list of POI text paragraph objects

    • addParagraph

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTextParagraph addParagraph()
      Adds a new empty paragraph to the end of the text box.

      The new paragraph is created with default formatting. To add text to it, use appendText(String, boolean) or manipulate the returned paragraph directly.

      Returns:
      the newly created POI text paragraph

    • duplicate

      public PotTextBox duplicate()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Creates a copy of this element on the same slide.

      Supported element types

      • PotShape geometric shapes
      • PotTextBox text boxes
      • PotImage images
      • PotTable tables
      • PotConnector connector lines

      Other element types such as PotAudio or PotVideo are not supported and will throw a PotException.

      Usage Example

      
 PotTextBox original = slide.addTextBox("Original");
 PotTextBox copy = original.duplicate();
 copy.setText("Copy").move(100, 0);
      Specified by:
      duplicate in interface IPotElement
      Overrides:
      duplicate in class PotElement
      Returns:
      a new element that is a duplicate of this one

    • getRawTextBox

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTextBox getRawTextBox()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI XSLFTextBox object for advanced operations.

      This method provides direct access to the POI text box. Use with caution, as modifications may affect the integrity of the wrapper and are not guaranteed to be compatible with future versions.

      Returns:
      the underlying POI text box object

    • at

      public PotTextBox at(double x, double y)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the position of the element to the specified coordinates.
      Overrides:
      at in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      x - the new X-coordinate, in points
      y - the new Y-coordinate, in points
      Returns:

      Parameters:
      width - the new width, in points; must be positive

    • scale

      public PotTextBox scale(double scale)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Scales the element uniformly by the specified factor.
      Overrides:
      scale in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      scale - the scaling factor; 1.0 represents 100%, must be positive
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • scale

      public PotTextBox scale(double scaleX, double scaleY)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Scales the element independently along the X and Y axes.
      Overrides:
      scale in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      scaleX - the horizontal scaling factor; must be positive
      scaleY - the vertical scaling factor; must be positive
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotate

      public PotTextBox rotate(double angle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the rotation angle of the element.

      Rotation is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      rotate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotation

      public PotTextBox rotation(double angle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the rotation angle of the element (fluent builder alias).
      Overrides:
      rotation in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotateBy

      public PotTextBox rotateBy(double deltaAngle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Rotates the element by the specified angle delta.

      Rotation is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      rotateBy in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      deltaAngle - the angle to add to the current rotation, in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • flipHorizontal

      public PotTextBox flipHorizontal()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Toggles the horizontal flip state of the element.

      Flipping is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      flipHorizontal in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • flipVertical

      public PotTextBox flipVertical()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Toggles the vertical flip state of the element.

      Flipping is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      flipVertical in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • bringToFront

      public PotTextBox bringToFront()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Brings this element to the front of the slide's drawing order.

      This operation manipulates the underlying XML structure of the slide.

      Overrides:
      bringToFront in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • sendToBack

      public PotTextBox sendToBack()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sends this element to the back of the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      sendToBack in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • bringForward

      public PotTextBox bringForward()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Brings this element one step forward in the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      bringForward in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • sendBackward

      public PotTextBox sendBackward()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sends this element one step backward in the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      sendBackward in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • animate

      public PotTextBox animate(PotAnimation animation)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies an animation to this element.
      Overrides:
      animate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      animation - the animation to apply; must not be null
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeAnimation

      public PotTextBox removeAnimation()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any animation attached to this element.
      Overrides:
      removeAnimation in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlink

      public PotTextBox hyperlink(String url)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches a hyperlink to this element that points to an external URL.

      Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      url - the destination URL; must not be null
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlink

      public PotTextBox hyperlink(PotHyperlink link)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches a hyperlink defined by a PotHyperlink object.

      If the provided link is null, any existing hyperlink is removed. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      link - the hyperlink configuration, or null to remove the hyperlink
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlinkToSlide

      public PotTextBox hyperlinkToSlide(int slideIndex)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Creates a hyperlink that jumps to a specific slide within the same presentation.

      This method sets both the internal slide reference and a fallback address string. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlinkToSlide in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      slideIndex - the zerobased index of the target slide
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeHyperlink

      public PotTextBox removeHyperlink()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any hyperlink attached to this element.

      This method manipulates the underlying XML because Apache POI does not provide a direct removal API. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      removeHyperlink in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • action

      public PotTextBox action(PotAction action)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches an action (e.g., mouseclick or mouseover) to the element.
      Overrides:
      action in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      action - the action configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeAction

      public PotTextBox removeAction(boolean isHover)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes an action from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeAction in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      isHover - true to remove a mouseover action, false to remove a mouseclick action
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • shadow

      public PotTextBox shadow(PotShadow shadow)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a shadow effect to the element.

      Shadows are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected. Passing null or a shadow of type PotShadow.Type.NONE removes any existing shadow.

      Overrides:
      shadow in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      shadow - the shadow configuration, or null to remove the shadow
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeShadow

      public PotTextBox removeShadow()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any shadow effect from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeShadow in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • reflection

      public PotTextBox reflection(PotEffect.Reflection reflection)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a reflection effect to the element.
      Overrides:
      reflection in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      reflection - the reflection configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Applies a glow effect to the element.
      Overrides:
      glow in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      glow - the glow configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Applies a softedge effect to the element.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      public PotTextBox removeEffects()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes all visual effects (shadow, reflection, glow, softedge, 3D) from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeEffects in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Applies a 3D rotation effect to the element.
      Overrides:
      rotation3D in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      rotation - the 3D rotation configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Applies a bevel effect to the element.

      Parameters:
      bevel - the bevel configuration
      Returns:

      material in class PotElement
      Parameters:

      Returns:

    • lighting

      public PotTextBox lighting(Pot3DFormat.Lighting lighting)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a lighting effect to the element.
      Overrides:
      lighting in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      lighting - the lighting configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • opacity

      public PotTextBox opacity(double opacity)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the opacity (transparency) of the element.

      Opacity is applied by manipulating the underlying XML, as Apache POI does not provide a direct API. The value must be between 0.0 (fully transparent) and 1.0 (fully opaque).

      Overrides:
      opacity in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      opacity - the opacity value between 0.0 (transparent) and 1.0 (opaque)
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class PotElement
